headline: Ecolab (ECL) Up 2.3% Since Last Earnings Report: Can It Continue?
summary: Ecolab (ECL) reported earnings 30 days ago. What's next for the stock? We take a look at earnings estimates for some clues.

headline: Ecolab (ECL) Gets Upgrade from UBS on Accelerating Pricing Outlook
summary: Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) is included among the 10 Safe Stocks to Buy for the Long Term in 2026. On May 27, UBS upgraded Ecolab Inc. (NYSE:ECL) to Buy from Neutral. It also raised its price target on the stock to $325 from $293. The firm said it expects the shares to re-rate higher as investors […]
